title: Bamboo Stuff
description: Bamboo Stuff enhanced the usage of Vanilla Bamboo, making it useful than ever!
body:
Bamboo Stuff helps you rethink about how useful bamboo really is.

What features Bamboo Stuff currently provide:

1. Make bamboo more useful than just a decoration item.
2. Fun to play around with various Bamboo traps method
3. Bamboo Equipments(Bamboo Tools, Bamboo Armor,...) really time-consuming to make but worth sacrificing
4. Compatibilities:
    Ice And Fire (Crafting)
5. Enhanced the needs of Smithing Table instead of just use for crafting Netherite Equipments.

 

What in-game trouble Bamboo Stuff will cause:

1. Bamboo Stuff is developed by only me. Consider donating using
    PayPal: https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/nguyenviet163
    Patreon: (Nah, not here yet!)
2. The materials require for making Bamboo Stuff's equipment usually time-consuming, fuel-consuming, bamboo-consuming. Some special tools comes with lots of ability but require bedrock, and to collect bedrock you need to find out.

3. One and only modloader supported: Forge (For Fabric and other modloader, please contact me using Facebook)
